description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish rpm from master that runs on a schedule every night at 1am and on push events with tags matching a semantic version pattern. The workflow has two jobs, build-rpm-release and build-rpm-nightly, both running on ubuntu-18.04. Each job checks out the repository, sets up QEMU, and then runs a script to build and push an RPM, with the build-rpm-release job using a release configuration and the build-rpm-nightly job using a nightly configuration.
